response.original_title: Whiskey 2: The Adventures of Boozy the Clown
response.overview: Boozy the Clown returns for another gloriously irresponsible journey through the underground snowboard and skate scene of the 1990s. Blending hard riding, brutal crashes, drunken road-trip chaos, pranks and a defiantly DIY attitude, Whiskey 2 captures an era before action sports became polished corporate entertainment.  Featuring Jimmy Halopoff, Alex Chambers, Jason Ellis, Chris Nichols, Andy Hetzel, the Red Dragons and many more, this cult snowboarding tape is less a conventional sports film than a time capsule of reckless camaraderie, loud music and complete disregard for good judgment.
response.tagline: More snow. More whiskey. Even worse decisions.
response.title: Whiskey 2: The Adventures of Boozy the Clown
